description_long: This is a classic red fire hydrant, constructed primarily from cast metal and featuring a cylindrical body with a domed top. The hydrant has three prominent hose connection outlets: two on the sides and one on the front, each secured with metal caps and attached chains. The top of the hydrant is fitted with an operating nut, used to open or close the water valve. The surface is painted bright red, with visible signs of wear, scratches, and some faded areas, indicating exposure to outdoor elements. There are manufacturer or model markings visible on the rear side, and the base is flanged for secure mounting to the ground. The overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, designed for emergency use in urban environments.
description: A robust, red metal fire hydrant with three hose outlets, chained caps, and a domed top with an operating nut. The surface shows wear and manufacturer markings, emphasizing its utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main hose outlet with a chained cap and the operating nut on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the side hose outlets and the attached chain, with the main outlet partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hydrant, visible manufacturer markings, and both side outlets with chains.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side hose outlet and its chained cap, with the main outlet in profile.
